DECLARATION OF MICHAEL BLACKSBURG IN SUPPORT OF PLTFFS MOTION TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALE MAK FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

MOTION AND NOTICE OF MOTION TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALE MAK FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DALE MAK FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OFF CALENDAR, INSUFFICIENT PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE CCP 1005. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF MUST MOVE TO VACATE DISMISSAL WITH COMMISSIONER BORICK BEFORE MOVING TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: JOANNE FARRELL, CSR #4838
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Enforce The Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DALE MAK FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR, INSUFFICIENT PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE CCP 1005. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF MUST MOVE TO VACATE DISMISSAL WITH COMMISSIONER BORICK BEFORE MOVING TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Joanne Farrell, CSR #4838

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)
